title: Emissive Mekanism
body:
**EN:**

**Makes ores from [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) mod emissive.**

---

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) mod.

**RU:**

**Ресурспак добавляет рудам из мода [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) свечение.**

---

Для работы необходим мод [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) или [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).
